title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (A), PAGE 45, SUBPARAGRAPH (17) III, FOR THE PROVINCE OF CEBU, PARAGRAPH F, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 2348 / 59 OG No. 35, 5716 (September 2, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3565, June 21, 1963 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (A), PAGE 45, SUBPARAGRAPH (17) III, FOR THE PROVINCE OF CEBU, PARAGRAPH F, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (a), page 45, subparagraph (17) III, paragraph f, Section two of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(a) Talisay Municipal Hall Constructionâ¦â¦â¦â¦â¦â¦.P75,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1963.
